message:
test(ftui-extras): improve diagram_layout.rs test coverage (bd-1juai)

Add 56 edge-case tests covering: clip_to_boundary (coincident,
horizontal, vertical, diagonal, negative), compute_bounds (empty,
single node), merge_sort_count_inversions (empty, single, sorted,
reversed, known), NodeBox overlaps (touching, identical, zero-size),
count_crossings (empty, single layer, no edges, known value, scratch
reuse), resolve_node (port, out-of-bounds), minimize_crossings zero
nodes, assign_layers empty graph, port resolution (all directions,
horizontal/vertical hints, out-of-bounds), RouteGrid default,
LayoutQuality, degraded flag, reversed edges, cluster edge cases,
remap_for_direction (all 4 variants), self-loops, disconnected nodes,
large graph, DiagramLayout clone.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
